Package de.uka.ilkd.key.settings

Class DefaultSMTSettings

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.DefaultSMTSettings
All Implemented Interfaces:
SMTSettings
public class DefaultSMTSettings extends Object implements SMTSettings
The default implementation of SMTSettings.

    useAssumptionsForBigSmallIntegers()
    Returns true if for too big respective too small integers (integers that are not supported) a constant should be introduced.
    boolean
    useBuiltInUniqueness()
    Returns true if the uniqueness property should be translated by using the built-in mechanism of the solver.
    boolean
    useExplicitTypeHierarchy()
    true If the transitive relations in the sort hierarchy should be explicitly modeled by formulas.
    boolean
    useUninterpretedMultiplicationIfNecessary()
    Returns true if a uninterpreted function should be used if the normal normal multiplication is not supported.

    • getMaxNumberOfGenerics

      public int getMaxNumberOfGenerics()
      Specified by:
      getMaxNumberOfGenerics in interface SMTSettings
      Returns:
      the maximum number of different generic sorts that is allowed within the taclets that are used.

    • getSMTTemporaryFolder

      public String getSMTTemporaryFolder()
      Description copied from interface: SMTSettings
      The path of the folder, where the smt files are stored temporarily.
      Specified by:
      getSMTTemporaryFolder in interface SMTSettings

    • getTaclets

      public Collection<Taclet> getTaclets()
      Description copied from interface: SMTSettings
      The set of taclets that should be used. Only supported taclets are used by the translation. In case that a taclet is not supported, it is ignored.
      Specified by:
      getTaclets in interface SMTSettings

    • getTimeout

      public long getTimeout()
      Description copied from interface: SMTSettings
      Returns the timeout that should be used for a single solver (in milliseconds).
      Specified by:
      getTimeout in interface SMTSettings

      Description copied from interface: SMTSettings
      true If a concrete null object should be used.

    • makesUseOfTaclets

      public boolean makesUseOfTaclets()
      Specified by:
      makesUseOfTaclets in interface SMTSettings
      Returns:
      true if taclets should be used as assumptions.

    • useAssumptionsForBigSmallIntegers

      public boolean useAssumptionsForBigSmallIntegers()
      Description copied from interface: SMTSettings
      Returns true if for too big respective too small integers (integers that are not supported) a constant should be introduced.
      Specified by:
      useAssumptionsForBigSmallIntegers in interface SMTSettings

    • useBuiltInUniqueness

      public boolean useBuiltInUniqueness()
      Description copied from interface: SMTSettings
      Returns true if the uniqueness property should be translated by using the built-in mechanism of the solver. Has only some effect if the solver supports a built in feature for uniqueness.
      Specified by:
      useBuiltInUniqueness in interface SMTSettings

    • useExplicitTypeHierarchy

      public boolean useExplicitTypeHierarchy()
      Description copied from interface: SMTSettings
      true If the transitive relations in the sort hierarchy should be explicitly modeled by formulas.
      Specified by:
      useExplicitTypeHierarchy in interface SMTSettings

    • useUninterpretedMultiplicationIfNecessary

      public boolean useUninterpretedMultiplicationIfNecessary()
      Description copied from interface: SMTSettings
      Returns true if a uninterpreted function should be used if the normal normal multiplication is not supported. In case that such a function should not be used an exception is thrown when a not supported multiplication occurs.
      Specified by:
      useUninterpretedMultiplicationIfNecessary in interface SMTSettings

      public SupportedTaclets getSupportedTaclets()
